text:
Once there lived an old wise owl named Ocelot. Ozel loved to listen to all kinds of animal stories and tales.

Every morning after breakfast, Ocea would fly down a hillside to where little owl chick OoOh lived.

OoOh loved OeoO.

They liked to talk books. OoOh had every book in the land.

One day, there was a new librarian who spoke a strange language nobody knew. OoOh could understand her.

One day Oelu began reading OoOh.

A big dark thing came...

OoOh fluttered away. Oelu ran. That night Oelu slept with owl feathers.

The next day Oelu forgot.

That day Oelu read OoOh...

That night...

*OoOh slept alone.*

Oelu listened. OoOh never woke.

*That was bad.*

*Oelu liked OoOh.*







OoOh...I think I likes you...You're nice.O?

*You're
